findings.title: Diff modifies a forbidden .specflow path
findings.detail: The diff adds a new file under `.specflow/`. Per the review contract, implementation diffs must not touch `.specflow/` or `.specify/`. Move this asset out of the forbidden path or change the approved delivery mechanism before merging.

findings.title: Derived max_finding_id is not persisted on write
findings.detail: Branch E derives MAX_FINDING_ID from existing findings when the ledger lacks max_finding_id, but the write path later computes new_max = max(prev_ledger.max_finding_id || 0, max(new_findings...)). If a legacy ledger is missing max_finding_id and the re-review finds no new issues, the saved ledger regresses to 0 instead of the derived max.

findings.title: Decision is not recomputed after prior-ID validation
findings.detail: The re-review flow auto-corrects Codex output by adding missing prior IDs to still_open_previous_findings and preferring still_open on duplicates, but it never recalculates decision after those corrections.

findings.title: No coverage for the new re-review branches and ledger edge cases
findings.detail: This change adds non-trivial behavior across prompt switching, corrupt-ledger handling, prior-ID validation, and max_finding_id persistence, but the diff includes no tests or reproducible verification artifacts.
